name: The Authentic Mrs. Field's Cookies!
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together butter, sugar, and brown sugar. Add egg and vanilla.
2. Blend oatmeal until it turns to a fine powder; set aside.
3. Grate Hershey Bar; set aside.
4. Mix powdered oatmeal, flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda in a bowl.
5. Combine all above ingredients except chocolate chips; mix well.
6. Add grated Hershey bar and chocolate chips.
7. Form golf ball-sized cookies, spacing them 2 inches apart on an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake at 400°F for 6-8 minutes.
